title: orthosiphon cuanzae
intro: Orthosiphon cuanzae, also known as Diuretin, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orthosiphon cuanzae include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of prostatitis and benign prostatic hyperplasia. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
